steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon after the blank signals that what follows explains the blank. The phrase they are joined together into a single cohesive unit tells us the elements are linked or connected.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean joined or linked into a unified whole — the colon's explanation tells us the elements are "joined together into a single cohesive unit." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — informal: means casual or unofficial — describes social tone, not how the physical elements of subak relate to each other. ✗
  • Choice B — optional: means not required — implies the elements can be omitted, which contradicts the idea of a single cohesive unit. ✗
  • Choice C — outmoded: means outdated or obsolete — the passage emphasizes the system's rich historical significance, not its obsolescence. ✗
  • Choice D — interconnected: means joined together with mutual links — directly matches "joined together into a single cohesive unit." ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
